description: Rise of Avalon Patch 9 (16 November 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon Mob Changes, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Corrupted Dungeon Mob Changes

items.text: Decreased the damage dealt by Forceful Swing and Reckless Swing
Slightly reduced the damage dealt by Furious Outburst
Infernal Chains
Rip and Tear
Groundsmash
Infernal Horror: Adjusted spell area to better match visual effects
Hellhound: Slightly reduced pursuit range
Demonic Warlock (Hunter Difficulty): Slightly reduced damage dealt

sections.searchable_text: Corrupted Dungeon Mob Changes Decreased the damage dealt by Forceful Swing and Reckless Swing Slightly reduced the damage dealt by Furious Outburst Infernal Chains Cast time: 1.4 → 1.45 Rip and Tear Cooldown: 8 → 9.5 Groundsmash Cast time: 1.3 → 1.4 Time between double attacks: 1.6 → 1.8 Infernal Horror: Adjusted spell area to better match visual effects Hellhound: Slightly reduced pursuit range Demonic Warlock (Hunter Difficulty): Slightly reduced damage dealt

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Added a new Marketplace subcategory for Battle Mounts
Satchels of Insight on the Black Market are now closer to their previous value, and their prices will increase more quickly
Adjusted behavior of Pathfinder Great Mage (Roads of Avalon boss) to better fit the terrain
Enchanted Stone added to Adventurer's Challenge weekly chests, bringing stone in line with other resources in these chests
Updated the following item icons to be easier to differentiate

subitems.text: Sacred Bone Marrow (used to craft Rageclaw mount)
Carved Skull Padding (used to craft Judicator Helmet)

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Added a new Marketplace subcategory for Battle Mounts Satchels of Insight on the Black Market are now closer to their previous value, and their prices will increase more quickly Adjusted behavior of Pathfinder Great Mage (Roads of Avalon boss) to better fit the terrain Enchanted Stone added to Adventurer's Challenge weekly chests, bringing stone in line with other resources in these chests Updated the following item icons to be easier to differentiate Sacred Bone Marrow (used to craft Rageclaw mount) Carved Skull Padding (used to craft Judicator Helmet)

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs

items.text: Frozen Hell (Icicle Staff)

subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frozen Hell (Icicle Staff) Slow Strength: 75% → 50%

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs

items.text: Divine Intervention (Hallowfall)

subitems.text: If you heal at least one ally, the cooldown of the ability decreases by 40%

items.text: Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs)

subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) Cooldown: 18s → 25s If you heal at least one ally, the cooldown of the ability decreases by 40% Sacred Pulse (all Holy Staffs) Cooldown: 8s → 12s Heal Value: 56 → 40

subsections.heading: Armor

items.text: Self Ignition (Spectre Jacket)

subsections.searchable_text: Armor Self Ignition (Spectre Jacket) True Damage vs Players: 50 → 45

subsections.heading: Helmets

items.text: Force Field (all cloth helmets)

subitems.text: Knockback no longer scales with IP
Instead, the ability now always knocks targets 14m away (ignoring crowd control resistance)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Force Field (all cloth helmets) Knockback no longer scales with IP Instead, the ability now always knocks targets 14m away (ignoring crowd control resistance)

items.text: Motivating Pain (Quarrier Workboots)

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous

items.text: AoE Escalation

subsections.searchable_text: Miscellaneous AoE Escalation 2 Targets = 8% → 5% 3 Targets = 16% → 10% 4 Targets = 24% → 15% 5 Targets = 32% → 20% 6 Targets = 40% → 25% 7 Targets = 40% → 30% 8 Targets = 40% → 35% 9+ Targets: remains at 40%

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: All tiers of Snapper (new Roads of Avalon fish) now give the correct Fame when eaten raw and can be made into Chopped Fish as intended
Fixed missing minimap information showing water and ability to fish in Caerleon Underway
Various dungeon and open-world terrain fixes
Additional minor graphical, animation, and localization fixes
